Who We Are
Built for Builders,
by Builders.

We bring together curious minds, aspiring professionals, and builders to explore emerging technologies, work on meaningful projects, and develop practical skills through hands-on experience.

We encourage experimentation, collaboration, and continuous learning as foundations for innovation. At Kashi Open Labs, we believe that great ideas emerge when people are given the freedom to explore, create, and learn by doing.

Based in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh — registered as an MSME, we are committed to building a culture of exploration, experimentation, and meaningful technology work.

🤖

Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning

Applied ML, model building, and real-world AI deployment projects.

📡

Internet of Things

IoT prototypes, sensor integration, and smart systems.

🌐

Web Technologies

Full stack development, modern frameworks, and open source.

📊

Data Analytics

Real datasets, EDA, dashboards, and data visualization.

📈

Business Analytics

Business insights, reports, and data-driven decision making.

Get Involved
Work on Real Projects.
Build What Matters.

At Kashi Open Labs, we work on real projects across multiple domains. Students and aspiring professionals can join us, contribute to live work, and build a portfolio they're proud of.

Duration
1 / 2 / 3 Months
Mode
Remote (Work From Home)
Stipend
Unpaid · Free for Students
Eligibility
All UG / PG Students
🌐

Web Development

Work on real-world web projects using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. Build responsive UI components and contribute to live project modules.

🤖

Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning

Work on applied AI/ML projects including data preprocessing, model building, and deployment. Focus on practical implementation.

📡

Internet of Things

Work on IoT-based project prototypes, sensor integration, and embedded systems aligned with smart agriculture and automation.

📊

Data Analytics

Work on real datasets using Python, Excel, and visualization tools. Build dashboards, perform EDA, and derive actionable insights.

📈

Business Analytics

Analyze business data, create reports, and support data-driven decision making. Work with case studies and live business problems.

🔬

Open Source & Research

Contribute to open source repositories, write technical documentation, and participate in applied research projects.
